title: Information processing device and image processing method
abstract: Provided is an information processing device that includes processing circuitry communicatively coupled to a display device. The processing circuitry receives information related to a status transition of a user during display of a spherical content image of virtual space, where the spherical content image covers an entire field of view of the user, receives a real-space image acquired by an outward-facing camera included in the display device on a basis of the received information related to the status transition, the display device is wearable on a head of the user, and the display device includes display that covers the entire field of view, and the processing circuitry controls the display device to display a translucent spherical content image and the real-space image.
claims: 1. An information processing device, comprising: processing circuitry communicatively coupled to the information processing device, wherein the information processing device is configured to be worn on a head of a user, and the processing circuitry is configured to: receive information related to a status transition of the user during display of a spherical content image of virtual space without display of a real-space image, wherein the spherical content image covers an entire field of view of the user, receive the real-space image acquired by an outward-facing camera included in the information processing device, wherein the information processing device is configured to cover the entire field of view of the user; and control, after the reception of the information related to the status transition, the information processing device to display a translucent spherical content image and the real-space image in a superimposed manner.
